headline: Don't Snack Today—Row Hard, Stay Disciplined
summary: You're gaining weight when you need to lose 0.6 kg weekly; today (Saturday) is where you choose—Huel and movement, or more failure.
details: Choose Huel pre-portioned meals and whole plant foods only today—no emotional snacking, no loose food choices. Hit the rowing machine for 35+ minutes or run 30+ minutes this morning; your deficit requires both eating discipline AND movement. Today defines your week: Saturday is your habitual sabotage point, but these two actions (strict eating, hard movement) close the 0.61 kg/week gap between your current pace and your June 2027 goal.
